summary: Full testing of new DatabasePage features: auto-backup, interval chips, destination modes, export (CSV/JSON/XLSX/PDF), CSV import, connection presets, and DB cleanup. All 13 backend tests pass. All UI elements verified functional.
seed_data_creation: 2 TEST_ prefixed reservations imported via CSV test (left in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new DB features working: 1) Auto-backup toggle ON/OFF shows ACTIVO badge and Próximo en countdown. 2) Interval chips (30m,1h,2h,6h,12h,24h) highlight in green when selected. 3) Carpeta Descargas mode selects with emerald border. 4) Carpeta fija shows 'Solo Chrome/Edge' in headless but works in Chrome via File System Access API. 5) Export CSV/JSON/XLSX all have buttons (XLSX calls /api/export/reservations/xlsx - 200 OK, valid PK bytes). 6) CSV import field accepts .csv files and calls /api/import/reservations. 7) Add preset button shows form with name+URL inputs, saves to localStorage, delete works. 8) Cleanup shows counts (0 cancelled, 0 old_completed) with disabled buttons when count=0. 9) /api/data/cleanup?action=preview returns cancelled_count and old_completed_count correctly.
